► Here is what I will cover in this video:
00:00 - Introduction
00:41 - Why Market Structure is Hard to Apply
01:13 - Continuation & Reversal
03:46 - What is a High Probability Range
04:45 - How a Range Gives You Entry, SL & TP
06:48 - The Structure Rule (What Makes it Hold)
08:02 - How to Avoid Confusion on Live Charts
09:34 - Time Frame Alignment & Top Down Analysis
11:22 - The 3 Criteria for a High Probability Range
14:05 - The Displacement Rule (Most Important)
15:06 - How to Measure Valid Displacement
16:54 - Putting It All Together
17:27 - Live Chart Examples & Walkthroughs
26:05 - Conclusion

► Summary: In this video, I will go over the right way to read market structure in 26 minutes, including the 3 criteria for a high probability range and the displacement rule that almost no one talks about. Enjoy.
